case_title: ECCLESON, THOMAS VS BILL WRENS TOWING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ECCLESON, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT BILL WRENS TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
